basic_details.job_title: PSSSB Craft Instructor Recruitment 2026 Short Notice - Apply Online for 681 Posts
basic_details.department: Directorate of Technical Education and Industrial Training, Punjab (Industrial Training Wing)
basic_details.short_information: The Subordinate Services Selection Board, Punjab (SSSB), also known as PSSSB, has issued a public notice announcing a direct recruitment drive for 681 Craft Instructor posts (various trades) under the Directorate of Technical Education and Industrial Training, Punjab (Industrial Training Wing).

important_dates.raw: Public Notice Issued: 07-07-2026 Starting Date for Apply Online: 10-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: To be Announced Detailed Notification Release: To be uploaded soon

qualification.details: Detailed eligibility criteria, including educational qualification and trade certificate requirements, have not been announced yet. This section will be updated once the official detailed notification is published on the SSSB Punjab website.

how_to_apply: Visit the official SSSB Punjab website: www.sssb.punjab.gov.in
Look for the notification link for Craft Instructor Recruitment 2026 (Advt. No. 03/2026)
Read the detailed notification carefully once released
Register with basic details and generate login credentials
Fill in the online application form
Submit the form and save a printout for future reference

rows.subordinate_services_selection_board_pun: Directorate of Technical Education and Industrial Training, Punjab (Industrial Training Wing)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Public Notice Issued: 07-07-2026 Starting Date for Apply Online: 10-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: To be Announced Detailed Notification Release: To be uploaded soon

content_sections.heading: PSSSB Craft Instructor 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The Subordinate Services Selection Board, Punjab will fill 681 Craft Instructor posts across various trades under the Industrial Training Wing. A trade-wise vacancy breakup has not been released yet and will be published along with the detailed notification.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Detailed eligibility criteria, including educational qualification and trade certificate requirements, have not been announced yet. This section will be updated once the official detailed notification is published on the SSSB Punjab website.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for PSSSB Craft Instructor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official SSSB Punjab website: www.sssb.punjab.gov.in Look for the notification link for Craft Instructor Recruitment 2026 (Advt. No. 03/2026) Read the detailed notification carefully once released Register with basic details and generate login credentials Fill in the online application form Upload required documents and photograph/signature Pay the application fee (once announced) Submit the form and save a printout for future reference

faq.question: Q1. How many Craft Instructor vacancies has PSSSB announced for 2026?
faq.answer: PSSSB/SSSB Punjab has announced 681 Craft Instructor vacancies (various trades) under Advertisement No. 03/2026.

faq.question: Q2. When will the PSSSB Craft Instructor online application start?
faq.answer: Online applications will begin from July 10, 2026, as per the public notice dated July 7, 2026.

faq.question: Q3. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted for the Directorate of Technical Education and Industrial Training, Punjab (Industrial Training Wing), through SSSB Punjab.

faq.question: Q4. Where can candidates check the detailed notification?
faq.answer: The detailed notification will be uploaded on the official SSSB Punjab website, www.sssb.punjab.gov.in, once released.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for PSSSB Craft Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date has not been announced yet. It will be updated once the detailed notification is published.
